subcodes.first_line: Thy letter hath attained unto the Most Great Horizon. Praise be to God, from it wafteth the fragrance of divine love. Such is the bounty of thy Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتابت بمنظر اکبر فائز الحمد لله عرف محبت رحمانی از او متضوع بوده ان فضل ربک
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @false claims to divine revelation or spiritual stations, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @hypocrisy, @praise and encouragement, @service to others; to the Cause of God
